---
title: "age_strata"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(here)

source(here("current", "plots", "age_stratified_estimate_plots", "bias_age_strata.R"))
source(here("current", "plots", "age_stratified_estimate_plots", "ecr_age_strata.R"))
source(here("current", "plots", "age_stratified_estimate_plots", "mean_se_age_strata.R"))
source(here("current", "plots", "age_stratified_estimate_plots", "estimate_sd_age_strata.R"))
source(here("current", "plots", "age_stratified_estimate_plots", "variance_calibration_age_strata.R"))
source(here("current", "plots", "age_stratified_estimate_plots", "cancer_deaths_age_strata.R"))

# Cumulative Representations by Age Strata(proportion)
source(here("current", "plots", "final_report", "cum_cancer_prop_age_strata.R"))
source(here("current", "plots", "final_report", "n_at_risk_prop_age_strata.R"))
source(here("current", "plots", "final_report", "cum_total_deaths_prop_age_strata.R"))
source(here("current", "plots", "final_report", "cum_other_prop_age_strata.R"))

## # Cumulative Representations by Age Strata (absolute)
source(here("current", "plots", "final_report", "cum_cancer_age_strata.R"))
source(here("current", "plots", "final_report", "n_at_risk_age_strata.R"))
source(here("current", "plots", "final_report", "cum_total_deaths_age_strata.R"))
source(here("current", "plots", "final_report", "cum_other_age_strata.R"))



source(here("current", "plots", "age_stratified_estimate_plots", "PPviz_parallel_function_age_strata.R"))

# 1. Specify a vector of target lambda scenarios
target_lambdas <- c(0.001, 0.003, 0.007, 0.014, 0.055) 

results_df <- read_csv(here("current", "outputs", "tables", "final_results_complete.csv")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(lambda = as.numeric(lambda))


```

```{r}
plot_bias_by_age(
  results_df   = results_df,
  title        = "PPE Bias Under Competing Risks by Age Class",
  followup_lab = "Follow-up"
)

#print(bias_plot)
```

```{r}
plot_ecr_by_age(
  results_df   = results_df,
  title        = "PPE ECR Under Competing Risks by Age Class",
  followup_lab = "Follow-up"
)

#print(bias_plot)
```

```{r}
plot_mean_se_by_age(
  results_df   = results_df,
  title        = "PPE Mean Estimated SE Under Competing Risks by Age Class",
  followup_lab = "Follow-up"
)
```

```{r}
plot_estimate_sd_by_age(
  results_df   = results_df,
  title        = "PPE Empirical Dispersion (Estimate SD) Under Competing Risks by Age Class",
  followup_lab = "Follow-up"
)
```

```{r}
plot_se_calibration_ratio_by_age(
  results_df   = results_df,
  title        = "PPE Empirical Dispersion (Estimate SD) Under Competing Risks by Age Class",
  followup_lab = "Follow-up"
)
```

## Pohar-Perme Visualization by Lambda Scenario age strata-specific overlay

```{r}
#| label: ppviz-age-strata-precompute
#| include: false

save_dir <- here("current", "outputs", "plots_data_age_strata")

# Build exact filenames without padding
target_filenames <- paste0("ppviz_age_strata_lambda_", as.character(target_lambdas), ".rds")
target_file_paths <- file.path(save_dir, target_filenames)

missing_files <- target_lambdas[!file.exists(target_file_paths)]

if (length(missing_files) > 0) {
  message("Pre-computed plots missing for lambdas: ", paste(missing_files, collapse = ", "), ". Running pre-computation...")
  
  results_df <- results_df %>% 
    dplyr::filter(lambda %in% target_lambdas)
  
  source(here("current", "plots", "age_stratified_estimate_plots", "precompute_viz_data_age_strata.R")) 
} else {
  message("Pre-computed data for all targeted lambdas already exists. Skipping pre-computation step.")
}
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-ppviz-age-strata-multiple-lambdas
#| fig.width: 9
#| fig.height: 6
#| fig.cap: "Age-Stratified Pohar-Perme versus theoretical net survival for selected lambda scenarios."
#| layout-ncol: 1

# 4. Loop through the specific file paths you defined above
for (file_path in target_file_paths) {
  if (!file.exists(file_path)) {
    warning("Warning: Pre-computed .rds plot file not found at ", file_path)
    next # Skip to the next file if one is somehow missing
  }
  
  p_data <- readRDS(file_path)
  
  # Extract and print the ggplot object
  print(p_data$plot_obj)
}
```


## Cumulative Representations by Age Strata
```{r}
plot_cum_cancer_prop_by_age(results_df)
```

```{r}
plot_cum_cancer_by_age(results_df)
```

```{r}
plot_n_at_risk_prop_by_age(results_df)
```

```{r}
plot_n_at_risk_by_age(results_df)
```

```{r}
plot_cum_total_deaths_prop_by_age(results_df)
```

```{r}
plot_cum_total_deaths_by_age(results_df)
```

```{r}
plot_cum_other_prop_by_age(results_df)
```

```{r}
plot_cum_other_by_age(results_df)
```
)
